title: Skilled Worker visa: immigration salary list - GOV.UK
content:
Guidance
Skilled Worker visa: immigration salary list
Check which jobs are on the immigration salary list in each area of the UK. For the Skilled Worker visa and the Health and Care visa.
From:
Home Office
Published
4 April 2024
Last updated
11 November 2025
 —
See all updates
Get emails about this page
Documents
Skilled Worker visa: immigration salary list
HTML
Details
A list of job types included on the immigration salary list in each area of the UK. There is a lower salary threshold if you have a job on the list for the
Skilled Worker visa
and the
Health and Care Worker visa
.
Updates to this page
Published 4 April 2024
Last updated 11 November 2025
+
show all updates

Updated row 6131 as part of the immigration rules changes.

Updated to reflect changes to the Immigration Rules which came into force on 22 July 2025.

Spring rules change - salary thresholds and going rates on the skilled worker route.
8 October 2024
Updated going rates table in line with changes to the Immigration Rules.
